conservative.name: Skulltaker
conservative.requirements: Engaged with the body of a recently fallen foe, targets within medium range

success.description: You burn the flesh from the skull of a defeated foe, claiming another skull for the skull throne. All followers of Khorne within medium range gain the Inspired condition
As above, and all enemies within medium range gain the Demoralised condition

boon.description: 1 follower of Khorne within medium range gains the Frenzied condition

success.description: You burn the flesh from the skull of a defeated foe, claiming another skull for the skull throne. All enemies within medium range gain the Demoralised condition
As above, and all followers of Khorne within medium range gain the Inspired condition
